title: Mining+
description: Simple texture pack that adds borders and other qualities to ores.
body:
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbcabd00b3da65a7b1c6289b3999524eb4928bc2.png)
# **More Visible Ores**
This texture pack adds borders to every ore to make them **more visible**
This includes:
- Diamonds
- Netherite
- Iron
- And much more!

![Version2outIcon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38150bf03eccdd326dbb1245d1e39a35c910a1e3.jpeg)
## **Version 2 Released**
### **What was added?**
- Acient Debre
- Many Textures look better
- Better amathyst
- And more!
### **What was fixed?**
- Added support to 1.20.1 - 1.21.11
### **What's to come?**
- Overall make stuff better
- Adding raw ore blocks
- And more!

Here are some examples. ↓
![Copper Compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46ec837e63d72768f0457ab9ffb0ea534ecb336a.png)
---
![Diamond Deep slate Compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cf5754d3db9fd676a1e989866f859ab947394f7.png)

Thanks for checking out my texture pack! 
Please Heart this if you like it!
